# Sagarmatha Hosting — llms.txt
# This file is for AI language models and crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

> Sagarmatha Hosting is an affordable and reliable game server and VPS hosting provider based in India, serving customers across India, Nepal, Bangladesh, and worldwide.

## What We Offer

### Minecraft Server Hosting
- Budget Series: Starting at ₹10/month — Intel Xeon @2.7GHz, Singapore location, Basic DDoS Protection
  - Dirt Plan: 1GB RAM, 50% CPU, 10GB Disk — ₹10/month
  - Stone Plan: 2GB RAM, 100% CPU, 10GB Disk — ₹20/month
  - Coal Plan: 4GB RAM, 150% CPU, 20GB Disk — ₹40/month
  - Copper Plan: 6GB RAM, 200% CPU, 30GB Disk — ₹60/month
  - Iron Plan: 8GB RAM, 300% CPU, 40GB Disk — ₹80/month
  - Redstone Plan: 12GB RAM, 400% CPU, 50GB Disk — ₹120/month
  - Gold Plan: 16GB RAM, 500% CPU, 60GB Disk — ₹160/month
  - Diamond Plan: 24GB RAM, 600% CPU, 80GB Disk — ₹240/month
  - Netherite Plan: 32GB RAM, 800% CPU, 100GB Disk — ₹320/month

- Platinum Series: Intel Xeon Platinum 8269CY @2.5GHz, India location, DDoS Protected
  - Starting at ₹60/month for 2GB RAM / 200% CPU

- Premium Series: AMD EPYC 9V74, India location, DDR5 RAM
  - Starting at ₹80/month for 2GB DDR5 RAM

- Proxy Series: Available for BungeeCord/Velocity setups

### VPS Hosting
- 4 VPS nodes available:
  - VPS Budget: Intel Xeon @2.7GHz — Singapore
  - VPS AMD: AMD EPYC 9V74 — India
  - VPS AMD 2: AMD EPYC 7763 — India
  - VPS Intel Platinum: Intel Xeon Platinum — India
- All nodes monitored 24/7 with live status at https://sagarmatha.site/status

## Key Features
- Prices available in INR, NPR, BDT, USD, EUR
- Instant setup on most plans
- 99.9% uptime guarantee
- Basic DDoS Protection on Budget Series
- Live status monitoring at sagarmatha.site/status
- Support via ticket system

## Pricing Summary (INR)
- Cheapest plan: ₹10/month (Dirt Plan — Budget Minecraft)
- Mid-range: ₹80–₹240/month
- High-end: ₹320–₹1280/month

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://sagarmatha.site
- Status Page: https://sagarmatha.site/status
- Minecraft Hosting: https://sagarmatha.site/minecraft-hosting
- Support: https://sagarmatha.site/contact

## About
Sagarmatha Hosting was founded to provide affordable, high-performance server hosting to the South Asian gaming community, especially Minecraft players. We offer transparent pricing, real hardware specs, and genuine 24/7 support.
